'''pafodo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pmole|pmole]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-f-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pmole|pmole]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pafodo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæfedeth|pæfedeth]] || [[word:pæfedej|pæfedej]] || [[word:pæfedesh|pæfedesh]] || [[word:pæfede|pæfede]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pafofodoth|pafofodoth]] || [[word:pafofodoj|pafofodoj]] || [[word:pafofodosh|pafofodosh]] || [[word:pafofodo|pafofodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pafodoth|pafodoth]] || [[word:pafodoj|pafodoj]] || [[word:pafodosh|pafodosh]] || [[word:pafodo|pafodo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pafofdoth|pafofdoth]] || [[word:pafofdoj|pafofdoj]] || [[word:pafofdosh|pafofdosh]] || [[word:pafofdof|pafofdof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pafodotho|pafodotho]] || [[word:pafodojo|pafodojo]] || [[word:pafodosho|pafodosho]] || [[word:pafodoko|pafodoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pafodoth|pafodoth]] || [[word:pafodoj|pafodoj]] || [[word:pafodosh|pafodosh]] || [[word:pafodo|pafodo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pafodothol|pafodothol]] || [[word:pafodojol|pafodojol]] || [[word:pafodoshol|pafodoshol]] || [[word:pafodokol|pafodokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pafodothotho|pafodothotho]] || [[word:pafodojojo|pafodojojo]] || [[word:pafodoshosho|pafodoshosho]] || [[word:pafodoko|pafodoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pafodothon|pafodothon]] || [[word:pafodojon|pafodojon]] || [[word:pafodoshon|pafodoshon]] || [[word:pafodokon|pafodokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pafodothoro|pafodothoro]] || [[word:pafodojoro|pafodojoro]] || [[word:pafodoshoro|pafodoshoro]] || [[word:pafodokoro|pafodokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
